code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(l)
  l
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut output = ""
mut running = 0
mut first = true
mut current = 0
mut sign = 1
mut in_num = false
mut has_digit = false

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
    if has_digit
      running = running + sign * current
      if first
        output = "#{running}"
        first = false
      else
        output = "#{output} #{running}"
      end
    end
    current = 0
    sign = 1
    in_num = false
    has_digit = false
  else if b == 45 and not in_num
    sign = -1
    in_num = true
  else if b == 43 and not in_num
    sign = 1
    in_num = true
  else
    current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
    in_num = true
    has_digit = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if has_digit
  running = running + sign * current
  if first
    output = "#{running}"
  else
    output = "#{output} #{running}"
  end
end

println(output)
